id.description: The unique ID of the organization membership.

organization_id.description: The ID of the organization which the user belongs to.

status.description: The status of the organization membership. One of `active`, `inactive`, or `pending`.

directory_managed.description: Whether this organization membership is managed by a directory sync connection.

organization_name.description: The name of the organization which the user belongs to.

custom_attributes.description: An object containing IdP-sourced attributes from the linked [Directory User](/reference/directory-sync/directory-user) or [SSO Profile](/reference/sso/profile). Directory User attributes take precedence when both are linked.

slug.description: The slug of the assigned role.

role.description: The primary role assigned to the user.
role.title: SlimRole

user.description: The user that belongs to the organization through this membership.

id.description: The unique ID of the user.

first_name.description: The first name of the user.

last_name.description: The last name of the user.

profile_picture_url.description: A URL reference to an image representing the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

email_verified.description: Whether the user's email has been verified.

external_id.description: The external ID of the user.

metadata.description: Object containing metadata key/value pairs associated with the user.

last_sign_in_at.description: The timestamp when the user last signed in.

user.title: UserlandUser

message.description: A human-readable description of the error.
message.example: A pending organization membership cannot be deactivated. This membership should be deleted instead.

code.description: The error code identifying the type of error.

message.description: A human-readable description of the error.

code.description: The error code identifying the type of error.

message.description: A human-readable description of the error.
